name: Crescents Dogs
recipeIngredient: 4 slices fat-free american cheese singles (cut into 6 strips each)
8 ozs reduced fat crescent dinner rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Slice the hot dogs so that each is cut within 1/2 inch of the ends.
3. Insert three strips of cheese in each slit.
4. Separate the dough into triangles and wrap it over the hot dogs.
5. Place on an unprepared baking sheet with the cheese side up.
6. Bake for 15 minutes or until golden brown.
